summary: Dashboard loading state displays correctly with proper structure and content, but uses generic app UI palette instead of the required diner brand palette for authenticated surfaces.

violations.description: The authenticated dashboard uses a generic neutral gray/white UI palette instead of sharing the diner brand palette (teal #9fd8d2, cream #fff8ea, etc.) that should be consistent across public and logged-in surfaces.

actions: Apply diner brand palette to authenticated dashboard surfaces - use cream #fff8ea for card backgrounds instead of white, and ensure visual consistency with public marketing surfaces
Verify that the dashboard state contract is otherwise functioning correctly - loading state renders properly with billing estimates, usage metrics, and indexes section as expected
